name: O.R.C. Mosquito
description: The O.R.C. Mosquito is the hostile controlled version of the mosquito in Grounded 2. It keeps the same airborne pressure and spacing control, but now commits to combat with far less hesitation.
behavior: It patrols open areas and O.R.C. zones from the air, landing only briefly to reposition. Once it locks onto a target, it stays on them far harder than a normal mosquito.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and tries to keep you permanently blocking or dodging. If other O.R.C. units already have you busy on the ground, the mosquito uses every opening to stab from outside your view.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually works over grounded O.R.C. patrols, diving in from above to finish targets already occupied by soldiers or heavier insects.
strategy: Fresh remains the best answer. Block the basic poke, watch for the sway before the combo, and punish the end of the divebomb before it gains height again.

abilities.name: Poke
abilities.description: A direct beak thrust used to keep immediate pressure on you.

abilities.name: Combo Poke
abilities.description: It chains several thrusts if it reads that you stayed still after the first hit.

abilities.name: Loop Divebomb
abilities.description: It rises, loops around, and comes back down in a long dive to close distance.
